'''sasolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampishness|swampishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampishness|swampishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sasolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæseleth|sæseleth]] || [[word:sæselej|sæselej]] || [[word:sæselesh|sæselesh]] || [[word:sæsele|sæsele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasosoloth|sasosoloth]] || [[word:sasosoloj|sasosoloj]] || [[word:sasosolosh|sasosolosh]] || [[word:sasosolo|sasosolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasoloth|sasoloth]] || [[word:sasoloj|sasoloj]] || [[word:sasolosh|sasolosh]] || [[word:sasolo|sasolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasofloth|sasofloth]] || [[word:sasofloj|sasofloj]] || [[word:sasoflosh|sasoflosh]] || [[word:sasoflof|sasoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasolotho|sasolotho]] || [[word:sasolojo|sasolojo]] || [[word:sasolosho|sasolosho]] || [[word:sasoloko|sasoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasoloth|sasoloth]] || [[word:sasoloj|sasoloj]] || [[word:sasolosh|sasolosh]] || [[word:sasolo|sasolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasolothol|sasolothol]] || [[word:sasolojol|sasolojol]] || [[word:sasoloshol|sasoloshol]] || [[word:sasolokol|sasolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasolothotho|sasolothotho]] || [[word:sasolojojo|sasolojojo]] || [[word:sasoloshosho|sasoloshosho]] || [[word:sasoloko|sasoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasolothon|sasolothon]] || [[word:sasolojon|sasolojon]] || [[word:sasoloshon|sasoloshon]] || [[word:sasolokon|sasolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasolothoro|sasolothoro]] || [[word:sasolojoro|sasolojoro]] || [[word:sasoloshoro|sasoloshoro]] || [[word:sasolokoro|sasolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
